command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Set RestartSec=600 ==="
sudo sed -i 's/^RestartSec=10$/RestartSec=600/' /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service
grep "RestartSec" /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service

echo "=== Reload systemd + re-enable ==="
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable hermes-gateway 2>&1 | tail -1

echo "=== START gateway ONCE ==="
sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway
sleep 12
echo "active state: $(systemctl is-active hermes-gateway)"

echo "=== Port 8080 listening? ==="
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 8080 || sudo ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 8080 || echo "8080 not yet listening"

echo "=== Log (check for 429 or successful start) ==="
tail -25 /tmp/hermes.log
REMOTE
